channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole on entry to roundabout coming from ALDI directon, 3rd March
item.description:
Next to white lines on entry to roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole reopened, 3rd March
item.description:
A large pothole has reopened just over the brow of the hill on Hucclecote Lane, heading towards Hucclecote. Previous repairs have not lasted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hucclecote Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 600x400x25mm footway criteria applied (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
ould you raise a perm repair for above job number STATION ROAD – Cheltenham : Underneath railway bridge, Station Road, Bishops Cleeve : STATION ROAD. Pothole defect

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd March
item.description:
15db 2hr make safe with road closure CW pothole approx 2400x500x100mm temp repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 300x400x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surround of drain is crumbling in street outside 10 Jasmin Way, 3rd March
item.description:
The road is crumbling around the drain cover oustide 10 Jasmin Way and is likely to collapse. This is a danger to the residents of Jasmin Way and makes it a danger to the homeowner of 10 Jasmin Way as it is in the middle of their exit onto the street. Many drivers also use this corner to turn around their vehicles, so traffic is constantly going over the surface of the drain and its cover. Hence the wear and tear. However its lasted over 30 years without needing repair so far, which is good news!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Jasmin Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
2 x potholes need to be made safe appropriately

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Could you raise a perm repair enquiry for the above job at Leckhampton at the Collum Road : CHURCH ROAD. Pothole effect USRN 6700097 ( E ) 694409 ( N ) 219570
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 3rd March
item.description:
Customer reports that STW have set up a road closure at the location without warning or any diversion signage. Large vehicles are having difficulty navigating the alternative routes, around narrow streets, due to parked vehicles. They state that the network management duty is not being fulfilled.
Report on FixMyStreet
